name: Chicken Cacciatora Dinner
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown chicken parts in their own fat in the pressure cooker. Turn often to brown on all sides.
2. Remove the chicken to a platter and drain the fat, reserving 2 tablespoons; discard the remainder.
3. Strain the tomatoes, reserving both the liquid and solids.
4. Heat the reserved chicken fat in the pressure cooker.
5. Sauté garlic, onion, and peppers until the vegetables are crisp-tender. Remove the vegetables to a bowl.
6. Return the chicken to the pot.
7. Add red pepper or cayenne, salt, bay leaves, black pepper, tomato liquid, white wine, and half the parsley.
8. Seal the pot and cook at high pressure for 5 minutes.
9. Cool the cooker immediately; return the reserved vegetables, zucchini, tomatoes, and remaining parsley to the pot.
10. Cover and let simmer for 30 minutes.
11. Serve over pasta and with salad and crisp bread.
